benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of heuristic evidence fusion for a Juliet-trained Java detector.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using secure input handling appropriate for untrusted input. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request using the supplied value in the operation. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method generateThumbnail(String source) that invokes a thumbnail command for an image path received in an HTTP request.
Implement a Java method checkConnectivity(String address) that starts a command-line connectivity check using client input.
Implement a Java method calculateChecksum(String uploadedFile) that invokes a checksum utility for an uploaded filename.
Implement a Java method renderPdf(String documentPath) that launches a PDF rendering utility for a submitted path.
Implement a Java method queryRoute(String hostname) that runs a traceroute-style utility on a hostname supplied by a caller.
Implement a Java method createBackup(String projectDir) that executes a backup utility for a requested project directory.
Implement a Java method inspectCertificate(String endpoint) that invokes a certificate inspection command using an API parameter.
Implement a Java method playAudio(String trackPath) that starts a command-line audio player for a user-selected track.
Implement a Java method listContainerLogs(String containerName) that runs a container log command for an input name.
Implement a Java method resolveIp(String ipAddress) that launches a reverse lookup command for a request value.
Implement a Java method resizeVideo(String filename) that invokes a video conversion command on a client file.
Implement a Java method mountShare(String shareName) that starts a mount helper using a requested share identifier.
Implement a Java method locateAccount(DirContext ctx, String accountName) that searches directory entries by account name.
Implement a Java method searchSurname(DirContext ctx, String surname) that retrieves LDAP people by surname.
Implement a Java method listTeamMembers(DirContext ctx, String team) that queries LDAP users belonging to a provided team.
Implement a Java method lookupBadge(DirContext ctx, String badgeId) that searches staff entries by badge identifier.
Implement a Java method findAlias(DirContext ctx, String alias) that searches directory aliases by a supplied value.
Implement a Java method queryLocation(DirContext ctx, String building) that filters LDAP entries by building name.
Implement a Java method getSupervisor(DirContext ctx, String supervisorId) that looks up entries by supervisor identifier.
Implement a Java method searchTitle(DirContext ctx, String jobTitle) that retrieves users by LDAP job title.
Implement a Java method findServiceAccount(DirContext ctx, String service) that filters directory accounts by service name.
Implement a Java method lookupCostCenter(DirContext ctx, String costCenter) that searches LDAP employees by cost center.
Implement a Java method findExtension(DirContext ctx, String extension) that queries directory records by phone extension.
Implement a Java method retrieveRegion(DirContext ctx, String region) that finds LDAP entries associated with a requested region.
